title: Tangy Roasted Greek Cauliflower Fritters
description: A juicy, Mediterranean-inspired fritter featuring roasted cauliflower and tangy Greek yogurt for a kid-friendly, DASH-diet compliant meal.

ingredients.name: Greek Yogurt
ingredients.notes: plain, full-fat or low-fat for tanginess

instructions: Steam or roast the cauliflower florets until tender, then mash them coarsely in a large bowl.
Fold in the Greek yogurt, lemon zest, and dried oregano into the mashed cauliflower.
Add the beaten egg and garlic powder, mixing thoroughly to combine.
Gradually stir in the chickpea flour until a thick, scoopable batter forms.
Form the mixture into 8-10 small patties, roughly 2 inches in diameter.
Lightly brush both sides of the patties with olive oil or use a propellant-free spray.
Place the fritters in the air fryer basket in a single layer, ensuring they do not touch.
Air fry for 12-15 minutes, flipping halfway through, until golden brown and crispy.
Serve warm with an extra dollop of yogurt for dipping.
